---
pagetitle: "Projects"
---

```{=html}
<nav class="nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="index.html" class="brand">EJ.</a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="experience.html">Experience</a></li>
      <li><a href="projects.html" class="active">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="hobbies.html">Hobbies</a></li>
      <li><a href="insights.html">Insights</a></li>
    </ul>
    <a href="contact.html" class="btn-dark">Get in touch</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<main>
<div class="page page-xl reveal">
  <div class="eyebrow page-eyebrow">Projects</div>
  <h1 class="page-title">Selected work.</h1>
  <p class="page-intro">
    Each project is a small case study: the question, the approach, and what changed
    because of the work.
  </p>

  <div class="proj-grid">
    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">SQL</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Agentic AI</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-title">Agentic Nurse</div>
      <div class="proj-sub">An agentic AI prototype that surfaces early patient-deterioration alerts.</div>
      <div class="proj-block">
        <div class="proj-block-label">Context</div>
        <div class="proj-block-text">Nurses need earlier signals of patient deterioration without adding manual monitoring load.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-block">
        <div class="proj-block-label">Approach</div>
        <div class="proj-block-text">Translated nurse workflows into user stories, validated use cases with MIMIC-IV SQL views, and designed Python evaluation frameworks for accuracy, latency, and clinical safety.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-block">
        <div class="proj-block-label">Outcome</div>
        <div class="proj-block-text">A Telegram-based alerting prototype backed by a tested evaluation harness for reliability and safety.</div>
      </div>
      <a href="https://github.com/eeshajagdhane?tab=repositories" class="arrow-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View on GitHub →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Excel</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Data Modeling</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-title">Community Partners Databasing</div>
      <div class="proj-sub">A queryable database and widget for nonprofit partner data.</div>
      <div class="proj-block">
        <div class="proj-block-label">Context</div>
        <div class="proj-block-text">Nonprofit organization data at Morningstar was scattered and difficult to maintain.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-block">
        <div class="proj-block-label">Approach</div>
        <div class="proj-block-text">Designed schemas and built a Python widget to query, update, add, and delete records synchronized with the data lake.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-block">
        <div class="proj-block-label">Outcome</div>
        <div class="proj-block-text">A documented tool with user instructions that made partner data easy to maintain and access.</div>
      </div>
      <a href="https://github.com/eeshajagdhane?tab=repositories" class="arrow-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View on GitHub →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">TensorFlow</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Keras</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-title">Incremental Learning Model</div>
      <div class="proj-sub">A deep-learning model that keeps learning as new images arrive.</div>
      <div class="proj-block">
        <div class="proj-block-label">Context</div>
        <div class="proj-block-text">Image models degrade when new, distorted data appears over time.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-block">
        <div class="proj-block-label">Approach</div>
        <div class="proj-block-text">Built a model supporting continuous updates, with data augmentation and a similarity index to identify distorted images.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-block">
        <div class="proj-block-label">Outcome</div>
        <div class="proj-block-text">Reached 98.1% test accuracy, with the full model-development process documented.</div>
      </div>
      <a href="https://github.com/eeshajagdhane?tab=repositories" class="arrow-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View on GitHub →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</main>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <span>Based in San Diego, CA · UCSD MS Business Analytics</span>
    <div class="footer-links">
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/eesha-jagdhane" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/eeshajagdhane?tab=repositories" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
      <a href="mailto:ejagdhane99@gmail.com">Email</a>
      <a href="resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Resume</a>
    </div>
    <span>© 2026 Eesha Jagdhane</span>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
  }, { threshold: 0.08 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => io.observe(el));
</script>
```
